requirement_topic.en: Restricted Substances (No EU-style Horizontal RoHS Regime in Morocco)
requirement_topic.zh: 限用物质（摩洛哥无欧盟式横向RoHS制度）
requirement_topic.zht: 限用物質（摩洛哥無歐盟式橫向RoHS制度）

summary.en: Morocco does not run an EU-style horizontal RoHS list regime for all electrical products as a mandatory market-access condition. There is no direct local equivalent that mirrors EU Directive 2011/65/EU substance thresholds for power tools. Substance handling is generally applied through buyer-driven requirements, general safety or product-law context, and technical standards requirements rather than a national one-size-fits-all RoHS law.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥并未对所有电气产品施行欧盟式横向RoHS清单制度，且不存在对应欧盟指令2011/65/EU的市场准入阈值体系。对于电动工具而言，限用物质通常通过买方要求、一般安全/产品法以及产品技术标准要求实现，而非统一全国性RoHS强制法。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥並未對所有電氣產品施行歐盟式橫向RoHS名單制度，且不存在對應歐盟指令2011/65/EU的市場准入閾值體系。對於電動工具而言，限用物質通常透過買方要求、一般安全/產品法以及產品技術標準要求實現，而非統一全國性RoHS強制法。

standards_or_laws: No direct Moroccan horizontal RoHS-equivalent regime comparable to EU Directive 2011/65/EU
Substance expectations are managed through general product and commercial requirements

summary.en: China has a defined GB framework for restricted substances in electrical products, including mandatory baseline substances and disclosure practices. That framework does not map to a direct Moroccan equivalent law in this lane.
summary.zh: 中国对电器产品具有明确的GB限用物质框架，覆盖核心限值和披露要求。该框架并不直接映射到本条中的摩洛哥对应制度。
summary.zht: 中國對電器產品具有明確的GB限用物質框架，覆蓋核心限值和披露要求。該框架並不直接映射到本條中的摩洛哥對應制度。

gap.en: The gap direction is that Morocco has fewer direct statutory substance thresholds in this lane than EU or China frameworks. Exporters should still preserve CN chemical evidence for commercial screening, because downstream buyers may contractually require EU-like controls.
gap.zh: 差距方向是摩洛哥在此类问题上直接法定阈值体系较少，低于欧盟或中国框架。出口商仍应保留中国侧化学和RoHS证据以支持商业筛检，因为下游买方仍可能合同要求欧盟水平控制。
gap.zht: 差距方向是摩洛哥在此類問題上直接法定閾值體系較少，低於歐盟或中國框架。出口商仍應保留中國側化學和RoHS證據以支持商業篩檢，因為下游買方仍可能合約要求歐盟水平控制。

mandatory_status.target: No direct national Morocco equivalent to a mandatory EU-style horizontal RoHS law in this lane; substance obligations are handled through product-specific and contractual channels.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic scope where GB/T 26572 and disclosure obligations apply in China.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Morocco has no EU-style horizontal RoHS legal gate for this lane. Treat this as no direct national equivalence, but keep restricted-substance files ready for buyer and tender requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在本通道中摩洛哥不存在欧盟式横向RoHS市场准入门槛。应如实处理为无直接法定等效，但仍需保留限用物质文件以应对买方与招标要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在本通道中摩洛哥不存在歐盟式橫向RoHS市場准入門檻。應如實處理為無直接法定等效，但仍需保留限用物質文件以應對買方與招標要求。

requirement_topic.en: Battery Compliance Baseline for Cordless Power Tools
requirement_topic.zh: 无绳电动工具电池合规基线
requirement_topic.zht: 無繩電動工具電池合規基線

summary.en: There is no Morocco-specific market-access regime clearly equivalent to the EU battery directive model for cordless tool batteries. Battery compliance is handled via general electrical-safety import-conformity and transport safety frameworks, plus buyer or tender-specific requirements, not via an EU 2023 battery-law path.
summary.zh: 在本通道中，摩洛哥没有与欧盟电池法规模型直接对等的无绳电池市场准入体系。电池合规通常通过一般电气安全进口符合性、危险品运输框架，以及买方/招标要求来落实，而非通过欧盟2023电池法规路径。
summary.zht: 在本通道中，摩洛哥沒有與歐盟電池法規模型直接對等的無繩電池市場准入體系。電池合規通常通過一般電氣安全進口符合性、危險品運輸框架，以及買方/招標要求來落實，而非通過歐盟2023電池規例路徑。

standards_or_laws: General electrical and import-conformity requirements for power tools including cordless-battery models
Transport and dangerous-goods controls where applicable

summary.en: Chinese exports usually provide battery-related safety and transport evidence for lithium packs used in cordless tools, including test and declaration documents where required. These support documentation, but they do not create a direct Moroccan battery-law equivalence.
summary.zh: 中国出口通常提供无绳工具使用的锂电池安全与运输证据，包括必要的测试和声明文件。这些用于文件支撑，但不构成直接摩洛哥电池法等效。
summary.zht: 中國出口通常提供無繩工具使用的鋰電池安全與運輸證據，包括必要的測試和聲明文件。這些用於文件支撐，但不構成直接摩洛哥電池法等效。

standards_or_laws: China battery safety and transport export documentation practices
CN standards and procedures for lithium battery export support

gap.en: Do not assume that satisfying an EU-style battery regulation path is sufficient for Morocco. The realistic gap is scope mapping: link each cordless-tool model to the applicable Morocco import-conformity documents, transport obligations, and buyer requirements.
gap.zh: 不要假定满足欧盟式电池条例路径即可覆盖摩洛哥。现实中的差距在于范围映射：将每个无绳工具型号对应到摩洛哥适用的进口符合性文件、运输义务和买方要求。
gap.zht: 不要假定滿足歐盟式電池規例路徑即可涵蓋摩洛哥。現實中的差距在於範圍映射：將每個無繩工具型號對應到摩洛哥適用的進口符合性文件、運輸義務和買方要求。

mandatory_status.target: No direct Morocco-equivalent market gate matching EU battery regulation in this lane; obligations arise through general product import-conformity and transport safety requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China export documentation where lithium-battery safety and transport obligations apply in China.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No automatic Morocco-ready status from EU battery-regulation compliance alone. For cordless power tools, verify model-level evidence in the same import-conformity and transport framework used for the marketed product and buyer obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 单独依靠欧盟式电池法规合规不能自动视为摩洛哥就绪。对无绳电动工具，应按入场产品型号，在当地进口符合性与运输框架内核验买方义务下的证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 單獨依靠歐盟式電池法規合規不能自動視為摩洛哥就緒。對無繩電動工具，應按入場產品型號，在當地進口符合性與運輸框架內核驗買方義務下的證據。
